name: P1 Incident Response Automation
description: Automates P1 security incident response: creates war room, collects forensic artifacts, notifies stakeholders, and tracks remediation steps.
author: Evgeniy Gantman

nodes.name: Post Incident Brief to War Room

body.title: ={{ $json.title }}
body.tasks: ={{ $json.containmentSteps.map((step, i) => ({ title: step, description: `Containment step ${i+1}`, status: 'Waiting' })) }}

parameters.subject: =[{{ $json.severity }}] Security Incident Declared: {{ $json.title }}
